message:
bd-pzui: comprehensive auth.rs unit tests + fix concurrent agent errors

Added 35+ new tests for auth.rs covering:
- AuthStorage creation (valid JSON, corrupted, empty file)
- resolve_api_key precedence (override > env > stored)
- API key storage, persistence, multi-provider round-trip
- File permissions (0o600), parent directory creation
- Missing key handling, env key mapping for all providers
- Percent encode/decode, query pair parsing, URL building
- OAuth code input edge cases, expiry calculation
- redact_known_secrets, credential overwrite semantics
- PKCE uniqueness and SHA256 challenge verification

Also fixed compilation errors from other agents:
- interactive.rs: ThinkingContent.signature -> thinking_signature
- interactive.rs: ConversationMessage.text -> content
- session.rs: Usage field names (input_tokens -> input, etc.)
- session.rs: unused variable warnings

71 auth tests now pass (up from 16 originally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
